ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training dataset used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the model (e.g., 'experiment', 'production') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES training_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model weight */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the weight belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Value of the model weight */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Sparsity level of the model weight */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of the weight (e.g., 'kernel', 'bias') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_weights_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the metric belongs to */,
  "top1" REAL /* Top-1 accuracy */,
  "top5" REAL /* Top-5 accuracy */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight version */,
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weight the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the weight */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_versions_weight_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_id") REFERENCES model_weights ("weight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the log belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "user_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-model association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the model (e.g., 'owner', 'collaborator') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_weight_versions" (
  "user_weight_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-weight version association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weight version */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the weight version (e.g., 'owner', 'collaborator') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_weight_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_weight_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_weight_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES weight_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analysis_results" (
  "user_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-analysis result association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis result */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the analysis result (e.g., 'owner', 'collaborator') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analysis_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
